title: OldMacDonald
description: Allows farms be active even with no players nearby! No need to log in and go AFK!
body:
# OldMacDonald
OldMacDonald allows your farms to continue to grow, even with no players nearby. The plugin even works with 0 players online! 

# Key Features
- **Keep as many farms running as you'd like!** - There are no limits whatsoever!
- **Easy to set up** - Simple commands with autocomplete prompts.
- **Support for both plant and mob farms** - Mob spawners and most plants are functional currently, support for more will be coming in the future!
- **Lightweight** - OldMacDonald is designed to have as little impact on your server as possible!
- **Customisable farm size** - Players can customise the radius of their farm, up to the size limit that is decided by the server admins.
- **Admin customisation** - Admins are able to control what players can do with a permissions system (LuckPerms is recommended for permission management).

# Commands & Permissions
**/oldmacdonald** (_/omd_) -  The prefix for all OldMacDonald commands.

**/oldmacdonald help** - Shows a list of commands that can be used.

**/oldmacdonald info** - Shows what version of the plugin is active on the server.

**/oldmacdonald addfarm** (current | coords <x> <y> <z>) (<farmname>) (<radius>) - Add a farm at the player's current location, or a specified location, with a farm name and a specified radius (in blocks). Specifying radius is optional. If no radius is specified, the radius will be the default (24 out of the box, can be changed by server admins).

**/oldmacdonald listfarms** - Provides a list of all active farms on the server.

**/oldmacdonald removefarm** (<listIndex> | <farmname> - Remove a farm from the list of farms by either the index in the list of farms, or by the name of the farm (removal permissions coming soon).

**/oldmacdonald setmaxradius** - Change the maximum allowed radius of farms. _Only available to Admins by default. Permission can be assigned via LuckPerms._

**/oldmacdonald setmaxradius** - Change the maximum allowed radius of farms. _Only available to Admins by default. Permission can be assigned via LuckPerms._

**/oldmacdonald setdefaultradius** - Change the default radius of farms when radius is not specified. _Only available to Admins by default. Permission can be assigned via LuckPerms._

**/oldmacdonald setmaxmobs** - Change the maximum allowed number of each mob type in the world. Only applies to mobs spawned by OldMacDonald (i.e. with the default mob cap of 50, if there are 10 naturally spawning skeletons and a player sets up a mob farm for a skeleton spawner, only 40 skeletons at a time will spawn in the farm). _Only available to Admins by default. Permission can be assigned via LuckPerms._


# Initial Setup
To start using OldMacDonald, simply download it, drag the file into your plugins folder and restart your server. That's it! You can now login to your server and type '/omd help' to get an overview of the available commands. A configuration file has also been generated, which is located in '/plugins/OldMacDonald/'.

# Dependencies
OldMacDonald will only work if the chunks are active, so [KeepChunks](https://modrinth.com/plugin/keepchunks) is essential. [LuckPerms](https://modrinth.com/mod/luckperms) is not essential, but highly recommended.

# Important Notes
This plugin is a work-in-progress, so please look forward to more functionality in the future!

# Report a Bug/Provide Feedback
If you have encountered a bug or wish to provide feedback/feature requests, please do so [here](https://forms.gle/pytFwiKybbmEfFzA8)

I am a solo developer working on this plugin in my spare time, so please be patient when waiting for updates to the plugin, as they may take some time.
